name: Greek Style Pasta with Shrimp and Feta
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil.
2. Cut the onion into thin slices. In a large skillet, warm the olive oil over medium-high heat until hot but not smoking.
3. Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the mixture is golden, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the tomatoes, oregano, basil, and pepper to the skillet. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, breaking up the tomatoes with a spoon.
5. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally while you cook the pasta and prepare the shrimp (shell and devein them).
6. Uncover the sauce and bring it back to a boil over medium-heat. Add the shrimp, reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 3 minutes.
7. Add the black olives and half the feta cheese to the skillet, stirring to combine.
8. Drain the pasta and serve topped with the shrimp and sauce. Crumble the remaining feta cheese on top.
